assert_CompletionImpliesFullProtocol.condition:
(phase = "Complete") implies
        (dag_loaded
         and bindings_loaded
         and gwt_done = NumGWT
         and req_done = NumREQ
         and closure_valid
         and bindings_saved
         and dag_uploaded
         and bindings_uploaded
         and ~llm_called)

assert_TypeOK.condition:
and phase in {"Init", "LoadDag", "LoadBindings",
                  "RegisterGWT", "RegisterREQ",
                  "ClosureRecomputed",
                  "SaveBindings", "UploadDag", "UploadBindings",
                  "Complete"}
    and dag_loaded in BOOLEAN
    and bindings_loaded in BOOLEAN
    and gwt_done in 0..NumGWT
    and req_done in 0..NumREQ
    and closure_valid in BOOLEAN
    and bindings_saved in BOOLEAN
    and dag_uploaded in BOOLEAN
    and bindings_uploaded in BOOLEAN
    and llm_called in BOOLEAN
assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from RegisterPayload spec
